# Enforce Conflict Timeout

## Objective
Automatically pause destructive interactions to prevent emotional damage.

1. Ingest rapid-frequency Tier 1 messages.
2. If text pattern matches flooding metrics, issue an interrupt.
3. Formulate Tier 3 response: "It seems we are stuck in a loop right now. Mediation will pause for 20 minutes to allow both of you to decompress."
4. Lock chat input for the duration unless it is an emergency bypass request.
